final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tactical equipment display illustration featuring firearms, body armor, and night-vision gear arranged in a professional layout (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "硬核军事风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Jane's Defence Weekly editorial photography, 1980s–1990s Cold War military equipment catalogs, Tom Clancy novel cover art; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a flat-lay or grid arrangement with all equipment items neatly aligned
Subject: must include the following tactical equipment:
  Firearms: multiple firearms (rifles, handguns) arranged in an orderly display
  Armor: tactical body armor / bulletproof vest
  Optics: night-vision goggles / NVG monocular
Scene/backdrop: must include a deep dark background (near-black or dark matte surface)
Lighting/mood: needs a cold, severe, high-authority atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dark, desaturated, cold-tone direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hard matte surface treatment with metallic and ballistic-fabric detail — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid: must avoid cartoonish or stylized rendering; must avoid warm or soft lighting; must avoid cluttered or disorganized layout
